subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! God, verily, bestoweth His blessings and exaltation upon them that have turned unto this Manifestation and have hearkened unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ان الله یصلی و یکبر علی الذین اقبلوا الی هذا الظهور و سمعوا منه ما
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
